payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark stained wooden base kitchen cabinet with recessed paneled doors and a glossy finish, lower front shows a small chip/tear and the left side is edge-cropped by the image; countertop overhang is visible above — approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
